    def open_order_notes(
        page: Page,
        order_id: str
    ) -> None:
        """
        Opens order details and customer notes.
        """
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        order_grid = page.get_by_role("grid")
    
        expect(order_grid).to_be_visible()
    
        order_button = order_grid.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=order_id,
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(order_button).to_be_visible()
    
        order_button.click()
    
        # Validate selected order matches tab title
        order_tab = page.get_by_title(order_id)
    
        expect(order_tab).to_be_visible()
    
        tab_order_id = order_tab.get_attribute(
            "title"
        )
    
        assert tab_order_id == order_id, (
            f"Expected order tab '{order_id}', "
            f"but found '{tab_order_id}'."
        )
    
        # Validate details pane order number
        order_details = page.get_by_text(
            f"Order #{order_id}"
        )
